extension.description: Ekstensi VS Code kanggo operasi SCM cerdas — Generasi pesen commit multibasa kanthi dhukungan AI (25 basa didhukung) lan fitur manajemen PR ing mangsa ngarep.
config.messageStyle: Gaya lan dawané pesen commit sing digawe
config.messageStyle.normal: Dawa normal kanthi sawetara konteks (1200 karakter)
config.customMessage: Pesen kustom sing ditambahake menyang prompt sistem (ditambahake sawisé pesen diff)
config.useEmoji: Gunakake emoji ing pesen commit lan deskripsi PR
config.emojiStyle: Gaya emoji sing digunakake ing pesen
config.reasoningEffort: Tingkat upaya penalaran GPT-5.2 (mengaruhi kualitas respons lan latensi)
config.reasoningEffort.none: Tanpa penalaran (paling cepet, kualitas paling endhek)
config.reasoningEffort.high: Penalaran dhuwur (paling alon, kualitas paling dhuwur)
config.maxInputTokens: Token input maksimal kanggo proses AI (standar: 200K)
config.useBulletList: Format badan pesen commit minangka dhaptar bullet
config.useConventionalCommits: Gunakake format Conventional Commits kanthi scope (<type>(<scope>): <subject>)
config.appendCommitTrailer: Tambahake trailer 'Commit-Message-By: otak-committer' menyang pesen commit sing digawe
config.syncApiKeys: Sinkronake API key lewat VS Code Settings Sync (nyimpen key ing state ekstensi sing disinkronake)
